# Hypotheses by vertical / niche

Use this file when the creative question depends on the niche rather than the platform alone.

| ID | Area / form | Hypothesis | Primary tactic | Best metric | First test |
|---:|---|---|---|---|---|
| H358 | SaaS / software | SaaS videos convert better when they show the workflow pain before the feature. | pain → feature | clicks, saves | feature-first vs pain-first |
| H359 | SaaS / software | Screen recordings need mobile-safe zooms and annotations to avoid UI blindness. | guided UI | completion | raw UI vs zoomed annotated UI |
| H360 | SaaS / software | Comparison against an old workflow makes value clearer than listing features. | before/after workflow | saves, clicks | feature list vs workflow comparison |
| H361 | Education / study | Study content saves better when delivered as a repeatable method, not motivation. | method format | saves | motivation vs method |
| H362 | Education / study | Worked examples outperform abstract advice for technical learning. | example-first | completion | principle-only vs worked example |
| H363 | Education / study | Spaced/review prompts increase follows if the account promises a continuing learning sequence. | series learning path | follows | standalone lesson vs sequence promise |
| H364 | Fitness | Wrong/right demonstrations outperform correct-only form tutorials. | contrast demo | saves | correct-only vs wrong/right |
| H365 | Fitness | Follow-along workouts complete better when timers are visible. | timer overlay | completion | no timer vs timer |
| H366 | Fitness | Fitness transformations need process proof to avoid feeling unrealistic. | process evidence | trust, follows | result-only vs process |
| H367 | Food / cooking | Food videos stop scroll with final dish or texture, not ingredient setup. | sensory result open | chose-to-view | ingredient vs final dish |
| H368 | Food / cooking | Recipe videos save better when measurements are on screen long enough to screenshot. | persistent measurements | saves | voice-only recipe vs labelled recipe |
| H369 | Food / cooking | One-pan/low-effort framing increases sends because the recipient category is obvious. | recipient clarity | sends | fancy recipe vs easy-weeknight recipe |
| H370 | Beauty / fashion | Transformation-first visuals outperform product-first intros. | before/after | chose-to-view | product-first vs transformation-first |
| H371 | Beauty / fashion | Use-case framing such as workplace/date/night-out increases saves over generic styling. | occasion framing | saves | generic look vs occasion look |
| H372 | Beauty / fashion | Side-by-side shade/fit labels reduce rewatch frustration and increase saves. | labelled comparison | saves, rewatch | quick try-on vs labelled side-by-side |
| H373 | Finance / money | Finance content needs credibility cues earlier than entertainment content. | source/proof early | trust/follows | claim-first vs source-first |
| H374 | Finance / money | Simple calculators or examples save better than abstract money principles. | worked example | saves | principle vs calculation example |
| H375 | Finance / money | Fear-based hooks may raise starts but reduce trust unless paired with measured, sourced advice. | fear control | completion/sentiment | alarm hook vs measured proof hook |
| H376 | Real estate / property | Property videos stop scroll with the strongest room/feature, not the front door. | best-feature open | chose-to-view | front-door tour vs feature-first |
| H377 | Real estate / property | Neighbourhood/context clips generate more saves than pure listing tours for buyers researching later. | local utility | saves | listing-only vs neighbourhood guide |
| H378 | Real estate / property | Before/after renovation clips share better when cost/time constraints are stated. | constraint proof | sends, saves | aesthetic only vs cost/time labelled |
| H379 | Travel | Travel videos save better when framed as itinerary/useful route, not only scenery. | itinerary utility | saves | scenery montage vs itinerary |
| H380 | Travel | Hidden-gem framing increases shares but needs proof of accessibility/cost to earn saves. | surprise + utility | shares + saves | hidden gem only vs hidden gem + logistics |
| H381 | Travel | Travel first frames should show the most distinctive place-specific visual immediately. | place-specific visual | chose-to-view | generic intro vs iconic visual |
| H382 | Music / performance | Music clips retain better when the best moment arrives in the first 3 seconds. | chorus/drop first | 3-sec hold | intro-first vs hook-first |
| H383 | Music / performance | Process/behind-the-song clips convert follows better than finished performance alone. | process story | follows | performance-only vs process+performance |
| H384 | Music / performance | Lyric/caption overlays increase shareability when the line is identity-relevant. | quotable lyric text | shares | no lyric vs lyric overlay |
| H385 | Art / design | Art process videos stop scroll with either final work or a dramatic transformation moment. | result/process hook | chose-to-view | blank canvas vs final/transform |
| H386 | Art / design | Design critique videos follow better when they explain the decision logic. | decision commentary | follows | aesthetic montage vs decision breakdown |
| H387 | Art / design | Before/after design videos save better when the design rule is extracted at the end. | rule extraction | saves | before/after only vs rule ending |
| H388 | Gaming | Skill tutorials save better when they freeze the exact input/mechanic. | annotated mechanic | saves | raw clip vs freeze/annotate |
| H389 | Gaming | High-stakes clips need the stakes label before the play begins. | stakes label | completion | raw play vs labelled stakes |
| H390 | Gaming | Patch/meta commentary gets search long-tail when the exact game/version is in title and first line. | specific metadata | search traffic | generic patch video vs versioned title |
| H391 | Ecommerce / retail | Product videos convert better from problem demonstration than aesthetic product display. | problem demo | clicks | beauty shot vs problem solve |
| H392 | Ecommerce / retail | Objection-handling clips improve qualified clicks for higher-consideration items. | objection content | CTR, comments | feature video vs objections video |
| H393 | Ecommerce / retail | Comparison grids increase saves when buyers need to decide later. | comparison matrix | saves | single product vs comparison |
| H394 | B2B / professional services | B2B videos should lead with business pain, not creator personality. | business problem hook | profile clicks | personal intro vs pain intro |
| H395 | B2B / professional services | Case studies convert better when the constraint, intervention and outcome are all visible. | case-study triangle | leads, follows | outcome-only vs full case |
| H396 | B2B / professional services | Authority content needs original frameworks or data, not generic tips. | original POV | saves/follows | generic advice vs original framework |
| H397 | Career / job / study life | Career videos save better when they include scripts, templates or checklists. | copyable asset | saves | advice vs script/template |
| H398 | Career / job / study life | Day-in-the-life videos retain better when framed by a concrete lesson or tension. | lesson-driven vlog | completion | ambient day vs lesson-driven day |
| H399 | Career / job / study life | Interview/resume tips share better when aimed at a specific recipient category. | send-to-specific-person | sends | generic career tip vs 'send to a grad' |
| H400 | Local services | Local service videos convert better when they show the messy before state first. | before-state hook | inquiries | service intro vs before state |
| H401 | Local services | Geographic labels improve qualified discovery but may narrow total reach. | local keyword | qualified inquiries | generic vs location-specific |
| H402 | Local services | Customer question videos build trust more efficiently than promo videos. | FAQ proof | comments/inquiries | promo vs customer question |
| H403 | Health / wellbeing - non-medical | Wellbeing content should avoid overclaiming and use practical, low-risk routines to preserve trust. | measured advice | sentiment/follows | absolute claim vs measured routine |
| H404 | Health / wellbeing - non-medical | Routine videos save better when they fit a clear time/context such as morning, lunch break or pre-sleep. | context-specific routine | saves | generic routine vs context routine |
| H405 | Health / wellbeing - non-medical | Relief framing works better than fear framing for sustainable wellbeing content. | relief + clarity | saves/follows | fear hook vs relief hook |
